portal.authSubtitle: Use your AgenticX account to enter enterprise workspace.
portal.wechatComingSoon: WeChat login coming soon. Please use email login.
portal.heroSubtitle: Connect top-tier LLMs with your enterprise knowledge base for fast, secure, all-in-one AI assistance.
portal.featureAiDesc: Fast answers, long-form summaries, data analysis, and coding
portal.featureWorkflowDesc: Rich scenario templates and one-click access to internal agents
portal.featureSecurityDesc: Conversations are never used for model training; data stays isolated
portal.forgotPasswordHint: Contact your enterprise administrator to reset
portal.termsPrefix: By signing in you agree to the

workspace.noHistory: No history yet. Start with New chat.

chat.suggestion1Description: Give me 5 ideas to improve employee onboarding
chat.suggestion1Prompt: Brainstorm 5 ideas to improve employee onboarding and suggest a practical first step for each
chat.suggestion2Description: Rewrite the previous content more concisely
chat.suggestion2Prompt: Rewrite the following content to be more concise and structured while preserving meaning:
chat.suggestion3Description: Turn meeting notes into a shareable daily report
chat.suggestion3Prompt: Turn the meeting notes below into a shareable daily report (decisions, action items, deadlines):
chat.modelNotAssignedHint: This session uses {model}, but that model is not assigned to your account. Ask an admin to enable it under Users → Visible models.
chat.noModelsHint: No models are available. Ask an admin to enable models under Platform → Model service and assign them to you under Users → Visible models.
chat.welcomeSubtitle: Nice to meet you. What can I help with?

general.uiThemeDescription: Switch anytime from the user menu · your preference is remembered
general.displayLanguageDescription: Chinese / English · switch from the user menu
general.chatStyleDescription: Switch between IM / Terminal / Clean styles
general.dataImportExportDescription: Export local settings as JSON or import from another profile

apiTokens.title: API Tokens
apiTokens.description: Create agx-pat-* tokens for scripts or IDEs to call Enterprise Gateway

modelService.sectionDescription: Choose a cloud provider and configure API keys
modelService.apiKeyDescription: Selected {provider} · keys are stored locally in the browser

defaults.sectionDescription: Pick default models for new sessions

webSearch.sectionDescription: Add real-time information to model responses
webSearch.enabledDescription: New messages may invoke Web Search
webSearch.enableWebSearchDescription: Allow chat messages to call the Web Search tool
webSearch.searchApiKeyDescription: Supports Bing / SerpAPI / Baichuan · stored locally

chat.streamingEnabledDescription: Responses render as they are generated
chat.autoTitleDescription: Generate a title after the first message
chat.defaultTemperatureDescription: Lower is more deterministic, higher is more varied
